Vendors & Moderation

Manage registered vendors, review verification status, and handle platform moderation.

@for (v of filteredVendors(); track v.id) {
@if (v.accountStatus === 'suspended') {
SUSPENDED
} @else if (v.accountStatus === 'banned') {
BANNED
}
{{ v.businessName[0] }}
{{ v.businessName }}
{{ v.name }}
{{ statusLabel(v.verificationStatus) }}
{{ v.email }}
{{ v.phone }}
{{ v.city }}
@for (svc of v.services; track svc) { {{ svc | titlecase }} }
@if (v.rating > 0) {
⭐ {{ v.rating }} ({{ v.totalReviews }} reviews) · ₹{{ (v.totalEarnings / 100000).toFixed(1) }}L earned
} @if (v.rating === 0) {
🆕 New vendor — no reviews yet
} @if (v.accountStatus === 'suspended' && v.suspensionReason) {
Suspension Reason: {{ v.suspensionReason }}
Duration: {{ v.suspensionDuration === '1_week' ? '1 Week' : v.suspensionDuration === '1_month' ? '1 Month' : 'Indefinite' }}
}
@if (isAdmin()) { @if (v.accountStatus === 'active' || !v.accountStatus) { } @else { } } @else {
View Only Mode
}
} @empty {
No vendors found

We couldn't find any vendors matching your current filters or search query.

}
@if (suspendingVendor(); as v) {
Suspend {{ v.businessName }}
}
